commands.review_summary:
The PR adds policy-gated model-call inputMessages/outputMessages capture for diagnostics-otel, centralizes the captureContent resolver, updates SDK exports/baseline, adds regression tests, and regenerates shared Swift gateway models.

Reproducibility: yes. for the model-call portion: current docs/config promise inputMessages/outputMessages content capture, while current main does not type or emit those fields on model.call events. The full linked issue's tool-content portion remains separately source-reproducible because production tool events still carry only paramsSummary.
